vocabulary.example: I am sorry I am late.
vocabulary.exampleBn: আমি দুঃখিত, আমি দেরি করে ফেলেছি।

phrases.bangla: তোমার সাথে পরিচিত হতে পেরে ভালো লাগলো
phrases.usage: When meeting someone for the first time

phrases.example: I have to go. See you later!

sentences.en: My name is Rakib. Nice to meet you.
sentences.bn: আমার নাম রাকিব। তোমার সাথে পরিচিত হতে পেরে ভালো লাগলো।

sentences.en: How are you? I am fine, thank you.
sentences.bn: তুমি কেমন আছ? আমি ভালো আছি, ধন্যবাদ।
আপনি কি আমাকে সাহায্য করতে পারবেন, দয়া করে?

quiz.explanation: 'Sorry' is used to express apology or regret.

quiz.q: What does 'You're welcome' mean in Bangla?
quiz.explanation: 'You're welcome' is the response to 'Thank you'.
'What is your name?' is the correct English translation.

story.title: A New Friend
story.body:
Riya is at school on her first day. She sees a girl sitting alone.

"Hello!" says Riya. "My name is Riya. What is your name?"

The girl smiles. "My name is Nila. Nice to meet you!"

"Nice to meet you too!" says Riya. "Could you please show me where the library is?"

"Of course!" says Nila. "Follow me!"

Riya says, "Thank you so much, Nila!"

"You're welcome!" says Nila. "We will be great friends!"

They both smile and walk together.

comprehension.q: Where does this story take place?
What did Riya ask Nila to show her?

listening.title: At the Café
listening.script:
Waiter: "Good morning! Welcome to Blue Cup Café. What can I get for you?"

Customer: "Good morning! Could I have a cup of tea, please?"

Waiter: "Of course! Anything else?"

Customer: "No, thank you. That's all."

Waiter: "Great! Your tea will be ready in a moment."

Customer: "Thank you so much!"

Waiter: "You're welcome! Enjoy your tea."

comprehension.q: How did the waiter respond to 'Thank you'?

speaking.prompt: Introduce yourself in English. Say your name, where you are from, and one thing you like.
speaking.example: Hello! My name is Rakib. I am from Dhaka, Bangladesh. I like reading books.
tips: Use 'My name is...' to introduce yourself

steps.speaker: app
steps.text: Nice to meet you! What's your name?

steps.speaker: app
steps.text: Great! I'm Alex. Where are you from?
